fragments.prompt: medium shot, modern open-plan office, light-gray walls and transparent glass partitions extending to frame edges, evenly distributed 5000K cool-white LED ceiling lighting, Li Xiao ...
fragments.negative_prompt: blurry face, distorted keyboard, incorrect hoodie color (e.g., black or gray instead of deep blue), hood up, smiling or distracted expression, visible text errors on screen, warm lighting, film grain, cartoon style, no code on screens, empty monitors, unrealistic shadows
fragments.style: cinematic realism, Fujifilm ETERNA grading, natural overcast lighting, 35mm lens

audio_prompt.prompt:
low-frequency office ambient noise (HVAC hum + tactile mechanical keyboard clatter), subtle rhythmic keystrokes, faint intermittent terminal beep alerts, quiet air movement through blinds, no speech or music

低频办公环境底噪（空调持续嗡鸣+机械键盘敲击声），细微有节奏的按键声，终端偶尔发出的短促‘滴’提示音，百叶窗缝隙间轻微气流声，无语音、无音乐
audio_prompt.negative_prompt: human voice, phone ringtone, footsteps, laughter, sudden loud sounds, music, distortion, silence-only
audio_prompt.voice_description: neutral ambient texture with precise transient detail for keyboard and HVAC
audio_prompt.scene_context: modern open-plan office during afternoon, quiet but dynamically textured ambient environment with focused work activity

fragments.prompt: extreme close-up, cinematic realism, Xiao Li's left-profile face turning slightly, pupils sharply constricting, eyebrows lifting subtly, lips parting faintly; crisp short electroni...
fragments.negative_prompt: smiling, closed eyes, wrong sweatshirt color (e.g. red/green), missing glasses, visible phone device, text overlay, cartoon style, motion blur on face, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, unrealistic skin texture
fragments.style: cinematic realism, Fujifilm ETERNA, natural overcast, 35mm

audio_prompt.prompt:
low-frequency office ambient noise (HVAC hum + light keyboard clatter), sudden crisp short electronic ringtone (high-pitched, 120ms duration, clean decay), subtle fabric rustle from sleeve movement, faint finger hover micro-sound above mechanical switches

低频办公环境底噪（空调持续嗡鸣+轻微键盘敲击余响），突发清脆短促电子铃声（高音调、120毫秒、干净衰减），卫衣袖口滑动产生的细微布料摩擦声，手指悬停于机械键盘上方的极轻微气流声
audio_prompt.negative_prompt: voice dialogue, footsteps, music, reverb-heavy ringtone, distorted audio, overlapping sounds, silence longer than 0.3s
audio_prompt.voice_description: neutral male ambient sound design, high-fidelity spatial recording, balanced frequency response, studio-grade clarity
audio_prompt.scene_context: modern open-plan office, afternoon, cool white LED lighting (5000K), glass partitions, dual monitors, ergonomic chair, quiet but dynamically punctuated by digital alerts

execution_suggestions: 保持相同种子值以获得一致性
